calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day having been continued from Monday, December 15, 2008, and after having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Jared Zaugg.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 15, 2008.
Declaration of Ruben Alcaraz in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 98 was filed by plaintiff on November 13, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N,.A. a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jared Zaugg as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,196.52.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,109.16.
Attorney's Fees - $1.550.00.
Costs - $341.00, for a total in the amount of $16,196.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Continued To Dec-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Set For Trial On Dec-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
